raw_text: Mattermost versions 11.3.x < = 11.3.0, 11.2.x < = 11.2.2, 10.11.x < = 10.11.10 fail to sanitize client-supplied post metadata which allows an authenticated attacker to spoof permalink embeds impersonating other users via crafted PUT requests to the post update API endpoint.. Mattermost Advisory ID: MMSA-2025-00569
